editorial.headline: Miami: beach energy, standout dining, luxury shopping, and neighbourhoods with very different moods
editorial.intro: Miami is a strong destination for travellers who want warm weather, stylish hotels, polished dining, and a mix of beach time, nightlife, shopping, and city energy. It works best when the stay is planned by area, since South Beach, Brickell, Design District, and Wynwood each offer a very different experience.
why_visit: A strong mix of beach, dining, nightlife, and city-break appeal
Excellent options for luxury travellers, couples, and short celebratory trips
Very good shopping across designer labels, premium malls, and fashion-led districts
Distinct neighbourhood identities that allow highly tailored recommendations
highlights: Very good for 3 to 4 day leisure stays
Strong fit for couples, luxury travellers, and shopping-led trips
Best results come from area-based planning rather than trying to move around too much each day
transport_tips: Plan by neighbourhood because travel times can stretch more than visitors expect.
Rideshare is often the simplest option between key visitor areas.
South Beach works best for beach-led stays, while Brickell suits a more polished urban base.
Book top restaurants, beach clubs, and spa appointments in advance, especially on weekends.

neighborhood_tips.name: South Beach
neighborhood_tips.tip: Best for beach access, lively atmosphere, and a classic Miami short-stay experience.

neighborhood_tips.name: Brickell
neighborhood_tips.tip: Ideal for a polished city base with luxury hotels, rooftop dining, and easy business-leisure crossover.

neighborhood_tips.name: Design District
neighborhood_tips.tip: Best for luxury shopping, fashion, design, and premium lunch-to-shopping days.

neighborhood_tips.name: Wynwood
neighborhood_tips.tip: Good for a more creative, casual, and social side of Miami with art and trend-led dining.

neighborhood_tips.name: Bal Harbour
neighborhood_tips.tip: Best for luxury shopping, quieter premium stays, and a more refined pace.

restaurants.headline: Recommended restaurants in Miami
restaurants.description: A practical mix of flagship dining, polished crowd-pleasers, and guest-friendly special-occasion options.

content.short_description: One of Miami’s classic restaurant recommendations and a strong seafood choice for first-time visitors.
content.long_description: Joe's Stone Crab is one of the easiest Miami restaurant recommendations because it is iconic, well known, and strongly associated with the city. It suits first-time visitors, celebratory meals, and guests wanting a classic Miami dining experience.
insider_tips: Best when guests want something recognisable and iconic rather than trend-driven.
Peak demand periods can be busy, so planning ahead helps.

google_places.name: Joe's Stone Crab
google_places.formatted_address: 11 Washington Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A very reliable recommendation for guests wanting a classic Miami meal.

content.short_description: A polished waterfront Miami recommendation with broad luxury and business-travel appeal.
content.long_description: Zuma is one of the strongest all-round premium dining recommendations in Miami. It works especially well for Brickell and Downtown guests, couples, and travellers looking for a stylish, dependable dinner with a luxury city feel.
highlights: Very useful for Brickell and Downtown stays
insider_tips: A strong recommendation when guests want a stylish dinner in a central urban location.
Best booked ahead for prime evening times.

google_places.name: Zuma Miami
google_places.formatted_address: 270 Biscayne Blvd Way, Miami, FL 33131, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A very strong premium dining recommendation for urban Miami stays.

content.short_description: A useful Design District dining recommendation with broad city-break appeal.
content.long_description: Michael's Genuine is a very practical recommendation for guests spending time in the Design District or looking for a polished but relaxed meal in a strong shopping area. It works well for lunch, early dinners, and fashion-led days.
highlights: Good lunch and early dinner option
insider_tips: A very good recommendation when guests are already planning a shopping day in the area.
Useful for a polished but not overly formal meal.

google_places.name: Michael's Genuine Food & Drink
google_places.formatted_address: 130 NE 40th St, Miami, FL 33137, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A very useful dining recommendation to pair with a shopping-focused day.

activities.headline: Top activities in Miami
activities.description: Guest-friendly recommendations that work well for short leisure stays and first-time visits.

content.short_description: A strong cultural recommendation for guests wanting one polished indoor activity in Miami.
content.long_description: Pérez Art Museum Miami is a very good recommendation for travellers who want art, architecture, and a more elevated activity option beyond the beach. It works especially well for couples, design-conscious travellers, and guests staying in Brickell or Downtown.
highlights: Good cultural option for urban stays
Useful in warm or rainy weather
insider_tips: Works well as part of a Downtown or waterfront plan.
A good option when guests want one meaningful activity beyond shopping and dining.

google_places.name: Pérez Art Museum Miami
google_places.formatted_address: 1103 Biscayne Blvd, Miami, FL 33132, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A strong activity recommendation for guests who want a polished cultural option in Miami.

content.short_description: A strong Miami recommendation for guests wanting something scenic, iconic, and different from the beach scene.
content.long_description: Vizcaya is one of the most useful activity recommendations in Miami for guests who want architecture, gardens, and a more elegant experience than a standard sightseeing stop. It works well for couples, first-time visitors, and travellers wanting strong photos and atmosphere.
highlights: Good for couples and first-time visitors
insider_tips: Best in a relaxed daytime schedule rather than packed into a beach-heavy itinerary.
Very good for guests who enjoy scenic cultural stops.

google_places.name: Vizcaya Museum & Gardens
google_places.formatted_address: 3251 S Miami Ave, Miami, FL 33129, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A standout recommendation when guests want one scenic, memorable activity in Miami.

gyms.headline: Gyms and fitness options
gyms.description: Useful recommendations for guests wanting a proper workout beyond the hotel gym.

content.short_description: A strong premium fitness recommendation for guests staying in or around Miami Beach.
content.long_description: Anatomy is one of the more credible gym recommendations in Miami for guests who care about workout quality, design, and a premium wellness atmosphere. It works especially well for longer stays, fitness-focused travellers, and guests used to upscale club-style gyms.
highlights: Good fit for Miami Beach stays
insider_tips: Best for guests specifically asking for a serious workout option.
Check day-pass or visitor access in advance.

google_places.name: Anatomy Miami Beach
google_places.formatted_address: 1220 20th St, Miami Beach, FL 33139, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A strong premium gym recommendation for Miami Beach stays.

content.short_description: A polished Brickell fitness recommendation for guests wanting a premium urban gym environment.
content.long_description: Equinox Brickell Heights is a useful recommendation for guests staying in Brickell who want a familiar luxury fitness brand in a central city setting. It suits business travellers, premium urban stays, and guests who want a dependable high-end gym experience.
insider_tips: Best for guests already staying in Brickell or nearby.
Check access policies before recommending.

google_places.name: Equinox Brickell Heights
google_places.formatted_address: 25 SW 9th St, Miami, FL 33130, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A good recommendation for premium guests based in Brickell.

spa_wellness.headline: Spa and wellness recommendations
spa_wellness.description: Strong options for guests wanting premium treatments, relaxation, or a slower luxury day in Miami.

content.short_description: One of Miami’s strongest spa recommendations for guests wanting a premium resort-style wellness experience.
content.long_description: Lapis Spa is a high-confidence recommendation for guests looking for a luxury spa experience in Miami Beach. It works especially well for couples, celebratory stays, and travellers who want a clearly elevated wellness environment rather than a simple treatment booking.
insider_tips: Best booked ahead for weekends and popular treatment times.
Works particularly well as part of a slower beach-and-spa day.

google_places.name: Lapis Spa
google_places.formatted_address: 4441 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A top spa recommendation for beachside luxury stays in Miami.

items.name: The Spa at Mandarin Oriental, Miami

content.short_description: A polished and reliable luxury spa recommendation for guests staying in or near Brickell.
content.long_description: The Spa at Mandarin Oriental is one of the strongest city-side wellness recommendations in Miami for guests who want a premium hotel spa with a calmer, more polished atmosphere. It suits couples, luxury travellers, and premium urban stays.
insider_tips: A very good recommendation for guests who want spa access without staying on the beach.
Reserve treatments ahead for prime times.

google_places.name: The Spa at Mandarin Oriental, Miami
google_places.formatted_address: 500 Brickell Key Dr, Miami, FL 33131, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A strong spa recommendation for premium guests based in the city rather than on the beach.

shopping.headline: Shopping recommendations in Miami
shopping.description: Miami is one of the strongest shopping destinations in the US for luxury retail, designer labels, open-air premium centres, and stylish neighbourhood browsing.

content.short_description: Miami’s strongest recommendation for luxury shopping, fashion, design, and premium browsing.
content.long_description: The Miami Design District is the clearest shopping recommendation for guests looking for luxury retail in a polished, destination-style setting. It works especially well for premium travellers, fashion-focused trips, and visitors who want shopping to be a core part of the day.
highlights: Top luxury shopping recommendation in Miami
Strong pairing with premium lunch plans
insider_tips: Best for guests specifically asking for designer labels and polished retail.
Plan the day around the district rather than trying to combine it with too many distant areas.

google_places.name: Miami Design District
google_places.formatted_address: 3841 NE 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33137, United States

recommendation.editor_note: The strongest shopping recommendation in Miami for luxury and fashion-led trips.

content.short_description: A flagship luxury shopping recommendation for guests wanting premium brands in a more refined setting.
content.long_description: Bal Harbour Shops is one of Miami’s strongest shopping options for luxury travellers who want a quieter, more refined retail environment than the busier core city districts. It works especially well for premium beach stays and shopping-led trips.
highlights: Strong fit for premium leisure stays
insider_tips: Best for guests who want luxury retail in a calmer, more premium environment.
Works very well as part of a dedicated shopping day.

google_places.name: Bal Harbour Shops
google_places.formatted_address: 9700 Collins Ave, Bal Harbour, FL 33154, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A top luxury shopping recommendation for refined premium retail.

content.short_description: A polished urban shopping recommendation for guests staying in or near Brickell.
content.long_description: Brickell City Centre is a strong shopping recommendation for guests who want premium retail, easy access, and a modern city setting. It is especially useful for short stays, business-leisure trips, and travellers based in Brickell.
insider_tips: A very practical recommendation for guests staying in Brickell who do not want a longer shopping transfer.
Works well with lunch, spa, or rooftop plans nearby.

google_places.name: Brickell City Centre
google_places.formatted_address: 701 S Miami Ave, Miami, FL 33131, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A very practical premium shopping recommendation for guests based in the city.

content.short_description: A strong Miami Beach shopping recommendation for casual browsing, people-watching, and easy central access.
content.long_description: Lincoln Road is a useful recommendation for guests staying in South Beach who want a walkable shopping area with broad appeal. It is more lifestyle-led than ultra-luxury, and works well for casual shopping, cafés, and easy daytime plans.
highlights: Easy fit for South Beach stays
insider_tips: Best for relaxed daytime browsing rather than serious luxury shopping.
Works well when paired with beach time or casual lunch.

google_places.name: Lincoln Road
google_places.formatted_address: Lincoln Rd, Miami Beach, FL, United States

recommendation.editor_note: A strong walkable shopping option for South Beach-based guests.

content.short_description: A useful recommendation for guests wanting a more local, trend-led, and creative shopping experience in Miami.
content.long_description: Wynwood works well for guests who prefer independent boutiques, streetwear, local labels, and a more creative atmosphere over luxury malls and designer retail. It is particularly good for repeat visitors, younger travellers, and guests spending time in the area anyway.
highlights: Good for independent and trend-led shopping
Strong pairing with Wynwood dining and art
insider_tips: Best for guests who want atmosphere and local style rather than premium luxury retail.
Works well as part of a slower Wynwood afternoon.

recommendation.editor_note: A strong recommendation for guests wanting a more local and creative side of Miami shopping.
